content: {"pass": false, "issues": [{"problem": "Evidence ledger is empty, but the draft makes multiple substantive statements about what is \"unusual\", \"common\", or \"market\" (e.g., term structures, Delaware law being common, 2–5/3–7 year ranges) without any supporting ledger items.", "fix": "Remove or soften market-standard characterizations or add ledger items that support each such statement."}, {"problem": "Checklist item \"Attorney-review disclaimer included at top of output\" is not satisfied; the disclaimer appears only at the end.", "fix": "Move or duplicate the attorney-review disclaimer so that it appears clearly at the top of the report."}, {"problem": "Checklist items about jurisdiction-specific rules, flow-down obligations, NNN matrix, ratification clause, ADS defaults, and Pakistan labour law table are not addressed at all.", "fix": "Explicitly note each inapplicable checklist item as not applicable to this NDA clause, or confirm they are satisfied elsewhere."}]}
